ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., pro, amateur) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Join date of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  "formation_date" TEXT /* Formation date of the team */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode of the tournament (e.g., solo, team) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Prize pool of the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match belongs to */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the match */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "score_team1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score_team2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "best_of" INTEGER /* Best of series (e.g., best of 3, 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the stat belongs to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the stat belongs to */,
  "net_rating_change" REAL /* Net rating change of the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the player */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score per game */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team stat */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the stat belongs to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the stat belongs to */,
  "net_rating_change" REAL /* Net rating change of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score per game */,
  "total_kills" INTEGER /* Total number of kills */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the opponent belongs to */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent's team if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponents_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponents_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponent_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent stat */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent the stat belongs to */,
  "net_rating_change" REAL /* Net rating change against the opponent */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins against the opponent */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses against the opponent */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage against the opponent */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score against the opponent */,
  "head_to_head_wins" INTEGER /* Number of head-to-head wins */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponent_stats_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments_players" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments_teams" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id", "team_id")
)
